confirm.title: ${'确认删除已选 ' + (Array.isArray(gradeSelection) ? gradeSelection.length : 0) + ' 个年级？'}
confirm.description: 删除后关联单元和知识点列表会重新刷新，请确认已检查选中项。

confirm.title: ${'确认删除已选 ' + (Array.isArray(subjectSelection) ? subjectSelection.length : 0) + ' 个科目？'}
confirm.description: 删除后关联单元和知识点列表会重新刷新，请确认已检查选中项。

confirm.title: ${'确认删除已选 ' + (Array.isArray(unitSelection) ? unitSelection.length : 0) + ' 个单元？'}
confirm.description: 删除后知识点列表会重新刷新，请确认已检查选中项。

confirm.title: ${'确认删除已选 ' + (Array.isArray(knowledgeSelection) ? knowledgeSelection.length : 0) + ' 个知识点？'}
confirm.description: 删除后知识点列表会重新刷新，请确认已检查选中项。

children.treeData: ${(()=>{const form=knowledgeSearchForm||{};const subject=form.subject||'';if(!subject)return [];const keyword=String(form.keyword||'').trim().toLowerCase();const text=row=>[row.unit_code,row.unit_name,row.knowledge_code,row.knowledge_name,row.grade_name,row.subject_name].filter(Boolean).join(' ').toLowerCase();const units=(Array.isArray(allUnitList)?allUnitList:[]).filter(item=>item&&item.subject===subject);const rows=(Array.isArray(knowledgeList)?knowledgeList:[]);const gradeRows=(Array.isArray(gradeList)?gradeList:[]);return gradeRows.filter(grade=>units.some(unit=>unit.grade===grade.grade_code)).map(grade=>{const children=units.filter(unit=>unit.grade===grade.grade_code).map(unit=>{const hasRow=rows.some(row=>(row.unit_id||row.parent_id)===unit.unit_id);return Object.assign({},unit,{key:'unit_'+unit.unit_id,id:'unit_'+unit.unit_id,type:'unit',title:unit.unit_name||unit.unit_code||'未命名单元',name:unit.unit_name||unit.unit_code||'未命名单元',icon:'FolderOpenOutlined',children:[],__hasKnowledgeMatch:hasRow});}).filter(unit=>!keyword||text(unit).includes(keyword)||unit.__hasKnowledgeMatch);return {key:'grade_'+grade.grade_code,id:'grade_'+grade.grade_code,type:'grade',grade:grade.grade_code,subject,name:grade.grade_name||grade.grade_code,title:grade.grade_name||grade.grade_code,icon:'ApartmentOutlined',children};}).filter(grade=>grade.children.length>0||!keyword);})()}
